task_description: Add English (Australia) as a language with selected features and change the regional format to English (Australia).

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows a Windows Settings category tile with a blue language-and-clock style icon on the left and the label “时间和语言” with smaller text “语言、区域、日期” beneath it. A semitransparent red X is centered on this tile, indicating the exact click target. In the full screen, this is the main Windows 设置 home page with multiple category tiles such as 系统, 设备, 手机, 网络和 Internet, 个性化, 应用, 帐户, 游戏, 轻松使用, 搜索, 隐私, and 更新和安全; the target tile is in the middle area.
caption.action: Click the “时间和语言” settings tile.
caption.expectation: The Time and Language settings section should open, showing related options such as language, region, date, and time.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the left navigation list inside Windows Settings under 时间和语言, with items 日期和时间, 区域, 语言, and 语音. A semitransparent red X is centered on the row labeled “语言,” which has a small character-and-letter style icon to its left, indicating the exact target is that sidebar navigation item. In the full-screen image, the Settings window is currently on the 日期和时间 page, with the left sidebar for 时间和语言 visible and the main pane showing date/time options; the click is on a UI control in the left navigation area.
caption.action: Click the “语言” item in the left sidebar.
caption.expectation: The main pane should switch from 日期和时间 to the language settings page, and the 语言 item should become selected.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the 首选语言 section on the Windows 设置 > 时间和语言 > 语言 page. A semitransparent red X is centered over the light gray row labeled “添加语言,” next to a square button with a plus sign, indicating the exact target is that add-language control. In the full-screen image, the left sidebar has 语言 selected under 时间和语言, the main pane shows language-related categories and the Windows 显示语言 dropdown, and below it the preferred languages list currently contains 中文(简体，中国). The click is on a UI control in the main content area.
caption.action: Click the “添加语言” control in the 首选语言 section.
caption.expectation: A language selection interface should open, allowing a new language to be searched for or chosen from a list.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows the Windows language-selection dialog titled “选择要安装的语言.” At the top is a focused search box with a blue outline and a clear X icon on the right; the text currently in the field reads “englis,” indicating text is being entered into the language search field. Below it, the results list is filtered to language names including “English (United Arab Emirates),” “English (Ireland),” “English (Australia),” “English (Belize),” and “English (Philippines),” with Chinese descriptions beneath each. In the full-screen context, this dialog is open over Windows 设置 > 时间和语言 > 语言, where 中文(简体，中国) is the current preferred language and the add-language flow is active.
caption.action: Type “ENGLISH” into the language search field, continuing or replacing the current partial text so the list filters to English language options.
caption.expectation: The search results should update to English-related languages and make the desired English entry easier to select.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the list row labeled “English (Australia),” with the Chinese subtitle “英语(澳大利亚)” beneath it, indicating the exact target is that language entry in the results list. In the full-screen context, the Windows Settings language-selection dialog titled “选择要安装的语言” is open over the 语言 settings page, the search box contains “english,” and multiple English variants are listed with feature icons on the right; “English (Australia)” is one of the selectable result rows in the central dialog.
caption.action: Click the “English (Australia)” language entry in the results list.
caption.expectation: That language row should become selected or highlighted, enabling progression to the next step such as activating the Next button.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the gray button labeled “下一页,” which is the Next button at the bottom of the language selection dialog. In the full-screen context, the Windows Settings add-language dialog titled “选择要安装的语言” is open over the 语言 settings page, the search field contains “english,” and the “English (Australia)” row is highlighted in blue in the results list. The click target is a UI control in the dialog’s bottom area.
caption.action: Click the “下一页” (Next) button at the bottom of the language selection dialog.
caption.expectation: The selected language choice should be accepted and the dialog should advance to the next setup screen for installing or configuring English (Australia).

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the checkbox line labeled “文本到语音转换 (23 MB)” with a small monitor/speech-style icon to its left. The checkbox is a UI control in the install-language-features panel. In the full-screen context, Windows Settings is open to 语言, and an “安装语言功能” dialog for “English (Australia)” is displayed with several optional language features listed, including install language pack, set as Windows display language, text-to-speech, speech recognition, and handwriting. The target is the text-to-speech option in this dialog.
caption.action: Click the “文本到语音转换 (23 MB)” checkbox option.
caption.expectation: The text-to-speech feature should toggle its selection state, immediately checking or unchecking that option in the language feature list.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the checkbox area for the row labeled “手写 (6 MB),” next to a small blue pencil-in-a-square handwriting icon. This is a checkbox control within the install-language-features list. In the full-screen context, Windows Settings is open to 语言, and an “安装语言功能” panel for “English (Australia)” is displayed with optional features such as language pack, Windows display language, text-to-speech, speech recognition, and handwriting. The handwriting row is currently checked and is the exact click target.
caption.action: Click the “手写 (6 MB)” checkbox option.
caption.expectation: The handwriting option should toggle its selection state immediately, likely becoming unchecked while the install feature selections update.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the gray button labeled “安装” beneath the blue link “选择其他语言.” This is a UI control button in the bottom area of the install-language-features dialog. In the full-screen context, Windows Settings is open to the 语言 page, and the “安装语言功能” panel for “English (Australia)” is in the foreground with several optional features listed; the target is the Install button at the bottom next to “取消.”
caption.expectation: The dialog should begin installing the selected language features for English (Australia), and the install panel should close or transition to a progress/update state.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the tile labeled “区域格式,” with the smaller text “中文(简体，中国)” beneath it and a blue globe-like icon above it. This is a clickable settings tile in the top section of the page. In the full-screen context, the Windows Settings app is open to the “语言” page, showing several language-related tiles such as Windows 显示, 应用和网站, 区域格式, 键盘, and 语音; the target is the “区域格式” tile near the top center.
caption.expectation: The interface should open the region format settings section or page for the current Chinese (Simplified, China) format.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the blue dropdown field under “区域格式,” specifically on the selector displaying “推荐 [中文(简体，中国)]” with a small downward arrow at the right edge. This is a UI control in the settings content area. In the full-screen context, the Windows Settings app is open to the “区域” page, with sections for 国家或地区, 区域格式, and 区域格式数据; the highlighted dropdown is in the middle of the page beneath the current format text.
caption.action: Click the “区域格式” dropdown showing “推荐 [中文(简体，中国)].”
caption.expectation: The region format dropdown list should open, showing available format options to choose from.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the dropdown list item labeled “英语(澳大利亚)” within an open selection menu. The item is on a light gray row, indicating the exact target is this option in the list. In the full-screen context, the Windows Settings app is open to the “区域” page, and the “区域格式” dropdown menu is expanded with multiple English regional variants visible; the target is one of the options in this open menu.
caption.action: Click the “英语(澳大利亚)” option in the open “区域格式” dropdown list.
caption.expectation: That regional format option should be selected, the dropdown list should close, and the region format field should update to show “英语(澳大利亚)”.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the full Windows Settings screen with no semitransparent red X, indicating a scroll action rather than a click target. The page title is “区域,” and the main content currently shows sections for “国家或地区,” “区域格式,” and “区域格式数据.” The selected region format is visible as “英语(澳大利亚),” and below it are sample date and time formats such as Gregorian Calendar, Monday, and English-formatted dates and times. In the full-screen context, this is the Settings app under “时间和语言,” with “区域” selected in the left sidebar; the central settings page is the scrollable region being acted on.
caption.action: Scroll down in the main settings content area on the “区域” page.
caption.expectation: The page should move downward to reveal lower regional settings or additional related options beneath the currently visible format data section.
